name: simplepost
description: Agent skill for using SimplePost through MCP, CLI, HTTP API, Scheduler app, or TypeScript SDK.

interface.shortDescription: Use SimplePost from agents and apps.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex and ChatGPT-style agents through choosing and using the right SimplePost interface: MCP for Scheduler-connected accounts, CLI for terminal automation, HTTP API for service integrations, Scheduler app for account and scheduling workflows, and TypeScript SDK for in-process integrations.
defaultPrompt: Use SimplePost to publish this post.
Set up SimplePost MCP for this agent.
Add SimplePost posting to this app.
